case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. BAY AREA NISSAN LLC DOING BUSINESS AS NISSAN

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA NISSAN LLC DOING BUSINESS AS NISSAN INFINITI OF SAN FRANCISCO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
